items.title_en: Trump says 'I love the inflation' after consumer price index hits 3-year high
items.title_zh: 消费者价格指数创三年新高后特朗普表示“我喜欢通货膨胀”
items.desc_en: President Trump suggested that inflation would drop when the U.S. war against Iran ends, and said,  "we've been taking out millions of barrels of oil."
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统表示，当美国对伊朗的战争结束时，通胀将会下降，并表示，“我们已经消耗了数百万桶石油。”

items.title_en: The SpaceX IPO could be coming for the 'Magnificent Seven' and chip stocks
items.title_zh: SpaceX 首次公开募股可能会针对“七巨头”和芯片股
items.desc_en: The "Magnificent Seven" is the market pocket that's most likely to see a rotation, analysts say.
items.desc_zh: 分析师表示，“七巨头”是最有可能出现轮换的市场口袋。

items.title_en: Sen. Warren calls on SEC to delay SpaceX IPO, flagging concerns about valuation and governance
items.title_zh: 沃伦参议员呼吁 SEC 推迟 SpaceX IPO，表达对估值和治理的担忧
items.desc_en: Sen. Elizabeth Warren noted Elon Musk's "uniquely unchecked" power as SpaceX's majority shareholder and other concerns in a letter to the SEC.
items.desc_zh: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦 (Elizabeth Warren) 在给 SEC 的一封信中指出了埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 作为 SpaceX 大股东的“独特的不受限制”的权力以及其他担忧。

items.title_en: Humaniod robotics company raises up to $1.4 billion from Nvidia, Amazon and others
items.title_zh: Humaniod 机器人公司从 Nvidia、亚马逊等公司融资至多 14 亿美元
items.desc_en: Investors have rushed to back companies in the physical AI space
items.desc_zh: 投资者争先恐后地支持实体人工智能领域的公司

items.title_en: Company that bet big on Trump-backed crypto says its fortunes have improved
items.title_zh: 在特朗普支持的加密货币上大举押注的公司表示其财富有所改善
items.desc_en: AI Financial Corp. says it has mitigated some of the concerns that prompted it to say earlier that it may not be able to stay in business.
items.desc_zh: AI Financial Corp.表示，它已经缓解了一些促使其早些时候表示可能无法继续经营的担忧。

items.title_en: Trump signs $70 billion immigration funding bill after months of delay
items.title_zh: 拖延数月后特朗普签署700亿美元移民资助法案
items.desc_en: The $70 billion package will fund Immigration and Customs Enforcement and Customs and Border Protection through the end of President Donald Trump's term.
items.desc_zh: 700 亿美元的一揽子计划将为移民和海关执法以及海关和边境保护局提供资金，直至唐纳德·特朗普总统任期结束。

items.title_en: Trump pledges more Iran attacks, saying U.S. will be 'attacking them very hard'
items.title_zh: 特朗普承诺对伊朗发动更多袭击，称美国将“非常严厉地打击他们”
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump promised more attacks on Iran after strikes resumed this week. Earlier this week, he said a deal to end the war was near.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统承诺在本周恢复袭击后对伊朗进行更多袭击。本周早些时候，他表示即将达成结束战争的协议。

items.title_en: Trump doubles down on Pulte for intelligence post, calls for short-term extension of foreign surveillance law
items.title_zh: 特朗普加大力度任命普尔特担任情报职务，呼吁短期延长外国监视法
items.desc_en: Unless Congress acts, a key provision of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act will expire at the end of this week.
items.desc_zh: 除非国会采取行动，否则《外国情报监视法》的一项关键条款将于本周末到期。

items.title_en: Norway crown princess's son to stay in custody before rape verdict, says court
items.title_zh: 法庭称，挪威王储妃的儿子在强奸案判决前将被拘留
items.desc_en: Thr ruling overturns a lower court's decision on Monday ordering the release of the crown princess's 29-year-old son.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决推翻了下级法院周一下令释放王储妃 29 岁儿子的决定。

items.title_en: Dow falls 300 points on chip sell-off, Trump Iran threat and 3-year inflation high: Live updates
items.title_zh: 道琼斯指数因芯片抛售、特朗普伊朗威胁和三年高通胀而下跌 300 点：实时更新
items.desc_en: U.S. forces launched “self-defense strikes” against Iran on Tuesday in retaliation for the downing of a helicopter, pushing up crude oil prices.
items.desc_zh: 美军周二对伊朗发动“自卫打击”，以报复一架直升机被击落事件，推高原油价格。

items.title_en: SpaceX primed for double-digit pop on first day, if ‘perps’ trading is any guide
items.title_zh: 如果“perps”交易有任何指导的话，SpaceX 首日将实现两位数的增长
items.desc_en: Crypto traders are currently pricing the SpaceX pre-IPO perp on Hyperliquid at $161, about 19% above the company's fixed IPO price of $135 per share.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币交易员目前将 SpaceX 在 Hyperliquid 上的 IPO 前定价为 161 美元，比该公司每股 135 美元的固定 IPO 价格高出约 19%。

items.title_en: What screwworm's appearance in U.S. cattle could mean for beef prices this summer
items.title_zh: 美国牛身上出现螺旋虫对今年夏天的牛肉价格意味着什么
items.desc_en: The arrival of the invasive New World screwworm in Texas could hit consumers this summer with beef prices already an acute source of inflation.
items.desc_zh: 今年夏天，侵入性新世界螺旋虫在德克萨斯州的到来可能会对消费者造成打击，因为牛肉价格已经成为通货膨胀的一个严重来源。

items.title_en: College sticker prices top $100,000 at 16 schools — but many students pay significantly less
items.title_zh: 16 所学校的大学标价高达 10 万美元，但许多学生支付的费用要低得多
items.desc_en: The cost of attendance at a growing number of colleges is now more than six figures a year, according to data from The Princeton Review.
items.desc_zh: 根据《普林斯顿评论》的数据，越来越多的大学的入学费用现在每年超过六位数。

items.title_en: Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon kill 17, reports say
items.title_zh: 报道称，以色列对黎巴嫩南部的袭击造成 17 人死亡
items.desc_en: Nine of them were killed in a series of attacks in the town of Tayr Debba, according to Lebanon's state news agency.
items.desc_zh: 据黎巴嫩国家通讯社报道，其中九人在泰尔德巴镇发生的一系列袭击中丧生。

items.desc_zh: 将提示变成真正的 HTML 卡片组

items.title_en: Kalshi to make some users reveal job details to tackle insider trading
items.title_zh: Kalshi 要求部分用户透露工作细节以应对内幕交易
items.desc_en: After issues with insider trading, the prediction betting platform is adding new rules.
items.desc_zh: 在出现内幕交易问题后，预测博彩平台正在添加新规则。

items.title_en: Inside Myanmar, rebels are losing ground as military forces men into army
items.title_zh: 缅甸境内，武装分子正在节节败退，军队将男子编入军队
items.desc_en: The BBC travels with rebels to frontline positions in Myanmar to see how the war is unfolding.
items.desc_zh: BBC 随叛乱分子前往缅甸前线阵地，了解战争的进展情况。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: Check before check-in. What's behind a new safety campaign about power banks on aircraft?
items.desc_zh: 入住前请检查。关于飞机上移动电源的新安全运动背后的原因是什么？

items.title_en: Hero Studio Photos
items.title_zh: Hero Studio Photos
items.desc_en: Snap one photo, get listing-ready shots from every angle
items.desc_zh: 拍摄一张照片，从各个角度拍摄可供列表使用的照片

items.title_en: Version of AI tool 'too powerful for public' released to public
items.title_zh: 人工智能工具版本“对公众来说太强大”向公众发布
items.desc_en: Claude Fable 5 is a version of Anthropic's Claude Mythos, an AI program which caused a stir among technology, finance, and government leaders
items.desc_zh: Claude Fable 5 是 Anthropic 的 Claude Mythos 的一个版本，这是一个在技术、金融和政府领导人中引起轰动的人工智能程序

items.title_en: Nasa names next astronauts for Artemis Moon programme
items.title_zh: 美国宇航局任命阿尔忒弥斯月球计划的下一任宇航员
items.desc_en: Nasa names its next Artemis crew, though they will not be walking on the Moon or even going anywhere near it.
items.desc_zh: 美国宇航局任命了下一批阿尔忒弥斯宇航员，尽管他们不会在月球上行走，甚至不会去任何靠近月球的地方。

items.title_en: Farage says Reform has contacted X 'at highest level' over fake AI ads
items.title_zh: Farage 表示 Reform 已就虚假 AI 广告问题与“最高层”X 联系
items.desc_en: The fake ads feature the governor of the Bank of England - the Bank has urged people to report them.
items.desc_zh: 这些虚假广告的主角是英格兰银行行长，该银行已敦促人们举报这些广告。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots
items.title_zh: 欧盟命令 Meta 向人工智能聊天机器人开放 WhatsApp
items.desc_en: Meta has accused the EU of "regulatory overreach" and says its decision will allow tech giants like OpenAI free access to WhatsApp.
items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.desc_zh: 使用强大的机器人自动化体力劳动

items.title_en: Kenyan police fire tear gas at protest against US Ebola quarantine centre plan
items.title_zh: 肯尼亚警方发射催泪瓦斯抗议美国埃博拉检疫中心计划
items.desc_en: Protesters are concerned about cross-border infection risks and the lack of transparency from the government about the treatment centre.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者担心跨境感染风险以及政府对治疗中心缺乏透明度。

items.title_en: Could humanoid robots be heading for the battlefield?
items.title_zh: 人形机器人会走向战场吗？
items.desc_en: Armed forces are experimenting with humanoid robots, but battlefield deployment is some way off.
items.desc_zh: 武装部队正在试验人形机器人，但距离战场部署还有一段距离。

items.title_en: OpenAI plans to go public, intensifying investment race with Anthropic
items.title_zh: OpenAI拟上市，与Anthropic的投资竞赛加剧
items.desc_en: The company behind ChatGPT filed its plans one week after Anthropic did the same.
items.desc_zh: ChatGPT 背后的公司在 Anthropic 提交计划一周后也提出了同样的计划。

items.title_en: Apple unveils Siri AI makeover as Tim Cook bids farewell
items.title_zh: 蒂姆·库克 (Tim Cook) 告别之际，苹果推出 Siri AI 改造版
items.desc_en: The technology giant also revealed a series of new child safety features amid widespread scrutiny over "nudification" apps.
items.desc_zh: 在对“裸体”应用程序的广泛审查中，这家科技巨头还推出了一系列新的儿童安全功能。

items.title_en: Jailed crypto founder Sam Bankman-Fried seeks Trump pardon
items.title_zh: 被监禁的加密货币创始人萨姆·班克曼·弗里德寻求特朗普赦免
items.desc_en: The former leader of crypto platform FTX, currently serving a 25-year sentence, on Monday officially applied to be pardoned.
items.desc_zh: 加密货币平台 FTX 的前领导人目前正在服刑 25 年，周一正式申请赦免。

items.desc_zh: 在浏览器中控制机器人 - 无需设置

items.title_en: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
items.title_zh: 斯塔默告诉苹果和谷歌禁止儿童手机上出现裸照
items.desc_en: Firms will be expected to activate built-in features to stop children accessing sexually explicit images.
items.desc_zh: 公司将被期望激活内置功能来阻止儿童访问露骨的色情图片。

items.title_en: The gamers taking on the industry to stop it switching off games
items.title_zh: 游戏玩家向行业发起挑战，阻止其关闭游戏
items.desc_en: Stop Killing Games is challenging the idea publishers can shut down a game without making sure it's still playable.
items.desc_zh: Stop Killing Games 正在挑战发行商可以在不确保游戏仍然可玩的情况下关闭游戏的想法。

items.title_en: Trump to meet AI leaders to discuss US investment in their companies
items.title_zh: 特朗普将与人工智能领导人会面，讨论美国对其公司的投资
items.desc_en: The US president said on Friday he expects to meet the leaders of top AI companies next week.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统周五表示，他预计下周将与顶级人工智能公司的领导人会面。

items.title_en: Raspberry Pi raises profit forecast as AI demand grows
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能需求的增长，Raspberry Pi 提高了利润预期
items.desc_en: The firm said it expected to deliver adjusted earnings of at least $38m (£28.2m) for the first half of 2026.
items.desc_zh: 该公司表示，预计 2026 年上半年调整后收益至少为 3800 万美元（2820 万英镑）。

items.desc_zh: 随着比特币价格再次下跌，这里有一些最棘手的加密货币术语的指南。
